Class AllReportsController

java.lang.Object
com.boba.AllReportsController
public class AllReportsController extends Object
This class contains all of the logic for the manager to be able to generate reports
Author:
Grant Duong, Nilay Alwar, Eli Goodrich, Maher Zaveri, Jack Anderson

    AllReportsController.SalesReportRow
    This is a nested class within the AllReportsController It contains the values of each row in a table of the Sales Report

    This is a nested class within the AllReportsController It contains the values of each row in a table of the X report
    class

    This is a nested class within the AllReportsController It contains the values of each row in a table of the Z report
